The '''Ragnar Syndicate''' was a member house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. It was specializing in unorthodox techniques and skills. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tregar]] often employed the Ragnar Syndicate to take out suspected cells of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] supporters in his [[Merel sector/Legends|sector]].

{{Company-stub}}
